items.label: § Type
items.value: Young Serif for display, Commissioner for body, DM Mono for labels, Caveat for marginalia.

items.label: § Palette
items.value: A warm paper and cocoa system. Every surface pair tested to WCAG 2.2 AA.

items.label: § Hand-built with
items.value: HTML, CSS, and React — no framework, no CMS. Content lives in a single JS file I edit by hand.

items.label: § Writing
items.value: Drafted in iA Writer, cross-checked in VoiceOver and NVDA before publishing.

items.label: § Hosted on
items.value: A static host, behind Cloudflare. No trackers. No cookies beyond theme preference.

items.label: § Source
items.value: The site is open-source and in the slow-burn phase of life. PRs accepted with patience.

items.label: § Built on
items.value: Unceded Ohlone land, in Oakland, California. I try to acknowledge this on the pages that count.
